name: @devnfw/app-template
description: DevnFW Application Template - Base for new apps

scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.clean: node -e "[ 'client/dist', 'server/dist', 'shared/dist' ].forEach(p => fs.rmSync(p, { recursive: true, force: true }))"

author: DevnFW Team
